:PROPERTIES:
:ID:       aaaaaaaa-aaaa-aaaa-aaaa-aaaaaaaaaaaa
:END:
#+title: Multi headline test
#+filetags: :test:fixture:

This file has a file-level ID and several headlines — some with their
own :ID:, some without. Use it to verify how the scanner attributes
headlines.

* Alpha
:PROPERTIES:
:ID:       bbbbbbbb-bbbb-bbbb-bbbb-bbbbbbbbbbbb
:END:

Alpha body — first child of the file.

* Beta
:PROPERTIES:
:ID:       cccccccc-cccc-cccc-cccc-cccccccccccc
:END:

Beta body — has its own ID.

* Gamma (no id)

Gamma has no :ID:, so its contents should attribute to the file-level node.

* Delta
:PROPERTIES:
:ID:       dddddddd-dddd-dddd-dddd-dddddddddddd
:END:

Delta body — link to Alpha: [[id:bbbbbbbb-bbbb-bbbb-bbbb-bbbbbbbbbbbb]].
